name: 17_Heart_Disease_Prediction_XGBoost_UCI_ML
query: Tengeneza mradi wa kutabiri ugonjwa wa moyo kwa kutumia mfano wa XGBoost na seti ya data ya UCI Heart Disease, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza uteuzi wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`. Tekeleza mfano wa XGBoost katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/shap_importance.png`. Hifadhi mduara wa ROC kwa `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Mwishowe, tengeneza ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo yote na vielelezo, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.html`. Hakikisha vielelezo vya SHAP vinaonyesha wazi vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi. Jumuisha kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine, kama vile Logistic Regression, ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost. Hifadhi mfano wa XGBoost chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usanifishaji wa data ambao unahakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Thamani za "SHAP" zinatumika kwa maelezo ya umuhimu wa vipengele, na matokeo yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`.
Ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.
Kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine (mfano, Logistic Regression) kunajumuishwa ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost.
Mfano wa XGBoost umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

preferences.criteria: Vielelezo vya SHAP vinapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi, na kufanya matokeo kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder that does not actually load the UCI Heart Disease dataset. The `load_dataset()` function returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}` instead of loading data from the specified UCI link or a local file. While the trajectory evidence mentions a successful file load from `data/raw/heart-disease/processed.cleveland.data`, this operation is not reflected in the actual code content of the file being judged. The requirement is for the dataset to be loaded within `src/data_loader.py`, which is not implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` does not contain any actual implementation of feature selection. The file only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset`, `build_transforms`) and requirement documentation. There is no code performing feature selection techniques such as filter methods, wrapper methods, or embedded methods. The environment feedback mentions feature selection was executed, but the actual code evidence is missing.
